message:
fix(search): correct indexing pipeline test assertions for command block docs

Three tests added in 4bb32fa2 had incorrect assertion values because
they didn't account for documents produced by extract_command_output_blocks
(which runs alongside chunk_scrollback_lines on the same input). Each
pane's lines produce both scrollback docs AND a command-block fallback doc
when no shell prompts are detected.

- tick_advances_fully_handled: deferred_rate_limited 1→3 (command docs
  also rate-limited)
- tick_tracks_exact: accepted 2→3, watermark(2).total 2→3, status total
  3→4 (command fallback "fresh-a\nfresh-b" has distinct normalized text)
- tick_counts_exact: accepted 2→3, skipped_dup 1→2, watermark(1).total
  2→3 (command fallback "alpha\nbeta" accepted as distinct doc)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
